title: erigeron × paulae
intro: Erigeron × paulae, also known as Paul's Fleabane, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Erigeron × paulae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
